career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'new Gemini 3 Deep Think, Anthropic $30B @ $380B, GPT-5.3-...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on Anthropic, Google, DeepMind, GPT-5

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: references specific benchmarks: ARC-AGI benchmark; references academic work; specific figures cited: '**ARC-AGI-2 at 84.6%', 't Exam (HLE) at 48.4%', '$30B'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'new Gemini 3 Deep Think, Anthropic $30B @ $380B, GPT-5.3-...' (Anthropic, Google, DeepMind, GPT-5) -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) covers Anthropic, Google, DeepMind, GPT-5 -- no overt promotional language, but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'new Gemini 3 Deep Think, Anthropic $30B @ $380B, GPT-5.3-...' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: cites concrete figures: '**ARC-AGI-2 at 84.6%', 't Exam (HLE) at 48.4%', '$30B'

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on Anthropic/Google topics -- insufficient history to assess
